name: Alibarbar Ingot
description: The Alibarbar Ingot 9000 delivers 9,000 puffs of bold flavour in a sleek, pocket-friendly design. A reliable choice for everyday vaping.

flavours.name: Skittles
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Skittles bursts with a rainbow of fruity flavours, delivering a sweet and tangy vape that’s as vibrant and playful as the classic candy.

flavours.name: Miami Mint
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Miami Mint delivers the crisp and cool taste of fresh spearmint, with a perfect balance of icy menthol and a hint of sweetness. The refreshing finish makes this blend ideal for those who enjoy a breezy, invigorating vaping experience with a clean touch.

flavours.name: Strawnana
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Strawnana delivers the sweet and creamy taste of ripe strawberries and smooth bananas, with a perfect balance of fruity tartness and tropical richness. The smooth finish makes this blend ideal for those who enjoy a lush, flavorful vaping experience with a velvet touch.

flavours.name: Cherry Pomegranate
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Cherry Pomegranate delivers the bold and tart taste of dark cherries and exotic pomegranate, with a perfect balance of deep sweetness and tangy acidity. The refreshing finish makes this blend ideal for those who enjoy a vibrant, fruity vaping experience with a zesty touch.

flavours.name: Flavour Roulette
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Flavour Roulette offers an exciting mix of mystery flavours, constantly surprising your taste buds with new, bold combinations. Perfectly balanced with a refreshing finish, this smooth and satisfying blend is ideal for adventurous vapers who love variety and enjoy an unpredictable vaping experience.

flavours.name: Black Pomegranate Cherry
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Black Pomegranate Cherry layers the deep richness of black pomegranate with the bold sweetness of ripe cherries. Finished with a smooth icy chill, it delivers a dark, fruity blend that’s both vibrant and refreshing.

flavours.name: Ribena
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Ribena delivers the deep and juicy taste of blackcurrant, with a perfect balance of sweet berry notes and a hint of tartness. The refreshing finish makes this blend ideal for those who enjoy a bold, nostalgic vaping experience with a smooth touch.

flavours.name: Pineapple Coconut
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Pineapple Coconut delivers the tropical and creamy taste of tangy pineapple and smooth coconut, with a perfect balance of zesty acidity and velvety sweetness. The refreshing finish makes this blend ideal for those who enjoy a sunny, exotic vaping experience with a luscious touch.

flavours.name: Cool Mint
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Cool Mint delivers a crisp burst of icy mint, offering a clean and refreshing flavor with a cooling finish. This smooth and satisfying blend is ideal for those who enjoy a cool, invigorating vaping experience with a fresh minty kick.

flavours.name: Tobacco
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Tobacco delivers the robust and earthy taste of premium sun-cured leaves, with a perfect balance of smoky richness and woody undertones. The smooth finish makes this blend ideal for those who enjoy a bold, authentic vaping experience with a refined touch.

flavours.name: Strawberry Lychee Ice
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Strawberry Lychee Ice blends the sweetness of ripe strawberries, the exotic floral notes of lychee, and a frosty menthol finish for a refreshing, tropical vape.

flavours.name: Pink Lemon
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Pink Lemon delivers the sweet and tart taste of pink lemonade, with a perfect balance of citrus and sugar. The refreshing finish makes this blend ideal for those who enjoy a zesty, invigorating vaping experience with a sweet touch.

flavours.name: Yellow Starburst
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Yellow Starburst bursts with the tangy citrus sweetness of the classic candy, delivering a smooth, juicy flavour that’s both zesty and sweet. Finished with a refreshing icy touch, it’s a vibrant and nostalgic treat for candy lovers.

flavours.name: Blueberry Mint
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Blueberry Mint fuses the juicy sweetness of ripe blueberries with a cool, invigorating mint finish, creating a bold and refreshingly smooth vape experience you won’t forget

flavours.name: Passion Fruit Mango Lime
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Passion fruit Mango Lime offers a tantalising trio of sweet mango, tangy passion fruit, and zesty lime, expertly blended to create a vibrant, tropical flavour profile. This smooth and satisfying blend is perfect for those who enjoy bold, fruity flavours with a refreshing twist.

flavours.name: Peach Ice
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Peach Ice delivers a juicy burst of ripe peach with a crisp, cooling menthol finish for a refreshing all-day vape.

flavours.name: Grape Grapefruit
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Grape Grapefruit combines the bold sweetness of ripe grapes with the tangy zest of grapefruit. Balanced by a smooth icy finish, this blend delivers a juicy, refreshing mix of sweet and tart that’s crisp and satisfying.

flavours.name: Strawberry Kiwi
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Strawberry Kiwi blends the juicy sweetness of ripe strawberries with the tart kick of kiwi. Rounded off by a cool finish, it’s a fruity, refreshing combination that’s crisp and balanced.

flavours.name: Strawberry Watermelon
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Strawberry Watermelon offers a tropical mix of juicy strawberries and refreshing watermelon, expertly blended to create a smooth, fruity flavor. This satisfying blend is perfect for those who crave a rich and tropical vaping experience with a refreshing finish.

flavours.name: Quadruple Berry
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Quadruple Berry blends four bold berries—strawberry, blueberry, raspberry, and blackberry—into one intensely fruity and tangy hit with a smooth, juicy finish.

flavours.name: WTF (Grapefruit)
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot WTF offers a zesty burst of tangy grapefruit, delivering a vibrant and refreshing vape with a perfect balance of citrusy sharpness and subtle sweetness.

flavours.name: FTP (Blackberry Dragon Fruit)
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot FTP combines the juicy richness of blackberries with the exotic sweetness of dragon fruit, creating a vibrant and refreshing vape experience.

flavours.name: Blackberry Ice
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Blackberry Ice delivers the bold, juicy flavour of blackberries, complemented by a refreshing icy finish. This smooth and satisfying blend is perfect for those who enjoy a fruity and cool vaping experience with a touch of menthol.

flavours.name: Mango Magic
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Mango Magic delivers the rich, sweet flavour of ripe mangoes, perfectly balanced with a smooth, tropical finish. This satisfying blend is ideal for those who enjoy a bold and fruity vaping experience with the exotic taste of fresh mango.

flavours.name: Double Apple
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Double Apple delivers a crisp and juicy combination of sweet red apples and tart green apples, perfectly balanced to create a fresh, vibrant flavour. This smooth and satisfying blend is ideal for those who enjoy a refreshing, fruity vaping experience with a burst of apple goodness.

flavours.name: Banana Buzz
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Banana Buzz delivers the creamy sweetness of ripe bananas, expertly blended to create a smooth, rich flavour. This satisfying blend is perfect for those who enjoy a comforting and fruity vaping experience with a natural sweetness.

flavours.name: Watermelon Ice
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Watermelon Ice delivers the juicy sweetness of ripe watermelon, perfectly balanced with a crisp, cooling menthol finish. This smooth and refreshing blend is ideal for those who enjoy a fruity and chilled vaping experience with a touch of ice.

flavours.name: Strawberry Coconut Watermelon
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Strawberry Coconut Watermelon offers a tropical mix of juicy strawberries, creamy coconut, and refreshing watermelon, expertly blended to create a smooth, fruity flavor. This satisfying blend is perfect for those who crave a rich and tropical vaping experience with a refreshing finish.

flavours.name: Kiwi Pineapple
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Kiwi Pineapple delivers a tropical fusion of sweet, tangy kiwi and zesty pineapple, perfectly balanced with a smooth, refreshing finish. This bold and vibrant blend is ideal for those who enjoy a fruity and exotic vaping experience that transports you to a tropical paradise.

flavours.name: Grape Ice
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Grape Ice delivers the juicy, sweet taste of ripe grapes, enhanced by a cool and refreshing icy finish. This smooth and satisfying blend is perfect for those who enjoy a vibrant, fruity flavor with a chilled, menthol twist.

flavours.name: California Sunset (Fanta)
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot California Sunset delivers a tropical medley of fruity flavours, featuring a perfect balance of sweet and tangy notes with a refreshing finish. This smooth and satisfying blend is ideal for those who enjoy an exotic and vibrant vaping experience, reminiscent of a sunset on a warm summer evening.

flavours.name: Blueberry Blast
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Blueberry Blast delivers a bold and juicy burst of ripe blueberry flavour, perfectly balanced with a refreshing finish. This smooth and satisfying blend is ideal for those who enjoy a vibrant and fruity vaping experience.

flavours.name: Chupa Chups Strawberry
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ingot Chup@ Chups Strawberry captures the nostalgic sweetness of classic strawberry candy, offering a rich, fruity flavour perfectly balanced with a smooth finish. This delightful blend is perfect for those who enjoy a sweet and fruity vaping experience that transports you back to your childhood.
